video.title: When to buy and sell stocks in Indian stock market? Basics of stock market for beginners in English
video.description:
In this video you will learn when to buy and sell stocks in Indian stock market, mistakes while buying and selling stocks and how to avoid those mistakes for a profitable portfolio. If you are wondering when to sell stocks for profit and when to sell stocks at a loss then watch this video till the end your doubt will be cleared. The video is aimed for covering the basics of stock market for beginners in English. The video is presented by Prasenjit Paul who himself earn crores from the stock market, you will find the proof in his another video https://bit.ly/3hYgbeN 

Learn complete fundamental analysis video tutorial series from Prasenjit Paul. Check the details from here https://bit.ly/4gyZJ1j 

If you want to get high quality fundamentally strong stocks for long term investment handpicked by Prasenjit Paul, join his YouTube membership program from here https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCXJUKywhKPtHUukbHxeIURw/join


Same video in Bengali https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fHKLaeLs-dU when to buy and sell stocks in Indian Stock Market. 
আগামি দিনে আমার বাংলাতে শেয়ার বাজার সঙ্ক্রান্ত সমস্থ ভিডিও এই নতুন Channel e আসবে https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC_n3xmjctRZTOyT6tMjsASg?sub_confirmation=1 ভিডিও গুলি পেতে অবশ্যই চ্যানেলটি বিনামুল্যে Subscribe করুন।

Video Content - When to buy and sell stocks (stock market for beginners)

00:00 - Introduction 
00:47 - When to buy stocks?
05:18 - Triggers of buying
08:47 - when to sell stocks?
09:51 - Triggers of selling

The video addresses when to buy stocks in Indian stock market, best time to buy and sell stocks , when to sell stocks for beginners and also when to buy stocks for beginners in the Indian stock market.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

If you want to get the pre-formatted excel sheet to analyze fundamental strength of a company within few minutes, join the fundamental analysis video series tutorial from here https://bit.ly/4gyZJ1j  . The course will compliment with this video - When to buy and sell stocks

Visit here https://bit.ly/4htwUo8 to know the current portfolio of Prasenjit Paul will all future buy and sell alerts on his personal portfolio.
